utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Next, check if each item is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: states comprehensive coverage for both physical and mental health and a monthly_cost (€350). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: enhanced home/contents with details and monthly_cost (€200). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided with features and monthly_cost (€150). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided with features and monthly_cost (€100). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided previous_cost (€985/month) and new_estimated_cost (~€800/month) with notes. While no annual figure is included, the item asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; at least monthly figures are present, and it summarizes total monthly. Since annual is not explicitly required if monthly is complete, this is reasonably specified for monthly breakdown. Hence, considered fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items by name: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Flexible Modular Add-ons (additional services). From the ground-truth ratings, PrimeCare Premium Plan appears under both physical and mental health with a rating of 10. PrimeHome Premium Coverage has a rating of 10 under home_content. PrimeTravel Premium Plan has a rating of 10 under travel_insurance. 'Flexible Modular Add-ons' does not appear anywhere in the ground-truth ratings, so it cannot be mapped.
